agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Find runtime errors, logic bugs, null-safety violations, unhandled edge cases, dead code paths, and error handling gaps in this codebase.

coverage.incomplete_reason: Codebase contains hundreds of files; sampled critical flow and auth paths to adhere to timeframe and finding cap limits.

findings.title: Uncaught Exceptions in Supabase Auth Handlers
findings.description: Auth errors are logged to console.error but the function returns null instead of throwing or returning an Error object, potentially hiding underlying authentication failures from the caller.

proof_hooks.summary: getCurrentUser logs errors and returns { user: null, error } after catching exceptions

repro_steps: Simulate a network failure during getCurrentUser()
Caller receives null user rather than an actionable error state
findings.impact: Callers treat null as 'not authenticated' and silently swallow authentication or network failures, obscuring outages and blocking meaningful recovery flows.

suggested_fix.approach: Return a discriminated union { user, error } or throw the error so downstream callers can surface auth failures instead of treating them as anonymous sessions.
suggested_fix.risk_notes: Callers assuming nullable users may need light refactors to handle explicit error objects.

history.notes: Detected auth error handling gap that returns null instead of surfacing failures.

findings.title: Loose Equality in Condition Node Evaluator
findings.description: The logic evaluator uses loose equality for the 'equals' and 'notEquals' operators. This can lead to unexpected type coercion bugs (e.g., 0 == "0", false == 0, "" == false).

proof_hooks.summary: Condition executor compares operands with equals / notEquals operators

repro_steps: Create a condition node in a flow
Compare the boolean false with integer 0 or empty string "" and observe unexpected truthy result under loose equality
findings.impact: Type coercion can route flows down the wrong branch, leading to misfired automations and incorrect task creation.

suggested_fix.approach: Use strict equality (=== / !==) and normalize operand types when coercion is intended.

history.notes: Identified flow branch selection risk from loose equality.

findings.title: Missing Code/State Check on Auth Callback OAuth Exchange
findings.description: The callback handler calls supabase.auth.getSession() even when no OAuth code is present, silently redirecting users without feedback if the exchange cannot succeed.

proof_hooks.summary: Auth callback requests session without validating presence of code/type parameters

repro_steps: Navigate to /auth/callback with no query parameters
Observe redirect to /login without any error messaging
findings.impact: Users see a confusing redirect loop instead of a clear error, reducing trust and increasing support burden.

suggested_fix.approach: Check for required OAuth parameters and render an explicit error state before invoking getSession when code/type are missing.

history.notes: OAuth callback path lacks guard for missing code/type parameters.

findings.title: Batch Task Creation Does Not Wait for Errors
findings.description: When handleCreateAll invokes onClose(), the component may unmount before the analytics event finishes or state settles. setIsCreating(false) then runs on an unmounted component, risking React state warnings.

proof_hooks.summary: handleCreateAll awaits onBatchCreate but calls onClose before resetting local state

repro_steps: Open SuggestionsModal with slow network latency
Click Create Tasks to trigger handleCreateAll
Observe potential state update on unmounted component warning if modal closes before finally block executes
findings.impact: Low-level race leads to noisy console warnings and could hide genuine failures if the modal unmounts before error handling finishes.

suggested_fix.approach: Defer onClose until after state cleanup or gate setIsCreating calls with an isMounted flag.

history.notes: Modal close sequence can fire before async analytics/state complete.

next_actions.action: Refactor Supabase auth helpers to surface structured errors instead of returning null on failures.
next_actions.rationale: Prevents silent auth failures and enables callers to display actionable messaging.

next_actions.action: Harden flow condition evaluation with strict equality and explicit type normalization.
next_actions.rationale: Eliminates type coercion bugs that can misroute automation paths.

next_actions.action: Add missing OAuth guardrails in AuthCallback and defer modal teardown until state settles.
next_actions.rationale: Reduces UX confusion and avoids state-update-on-unmounted warnings.
